历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 19820 → 22583 → 22703 → 23672 → 26218, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative shift of about 3500 positions in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 26218; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 53 in 2021, 52 in 2022, 52 in 2023, 53 in 2024, and 52 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 55, an increase of 3 students (+5.8%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition but to a limited extent.
3. [University Level] 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 115th on the Soft Science main ranking, stable between 113–115 in recent years, belonging to the mid-tier 211 level.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The university has no significant positive or negative public opinion incidents in reputation documents; Douyin popularity ranks 59th (relatively hot), with comprehensive popularity of about 543,000, and short video exposure is at the upper-middle level among 211 universities, reflecting a moderate increase in application attention; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, the university did not have any disciplines rated A- or above, with advantageous disciplines characterized by forestry engineering and forestry, matching the forestry major in enrollment.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, matching the popular majors in the Physics Category enrollment of this university, such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering, potentially attracting more applicants; the number of Physics Category examinees in the province increased from 117,000 in 2021 to 192,000 in 2025, with an estimated 204,000 in 2026 (+6.1%), intensifying competition due to the expanding examinee pool; Northeast Forestry University is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, far from Fujian Province, with cross-provincial applications influenced by regional preferences; the university's enrollment plan in Fujian Province accounts for a small proportion (about 55 students per year), which is a medium level for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the easing effect of a 3-student expansion (+5.8%) in 2026, the intensified competition from a 6.1% increase in provincial Physics Category examinees, and the increased attention reflected by Douyin's hot popularity, with examinee growth slightly exceeding the expansion rate, a small upward adjustment of 50 positions is made; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 27176, with a range of 26676–27676.
